body.title: Smoke tests: Librarian recall + scraps embedding engine
body.result: smoke tests in tests/librarian/ and tests/scraps/ — 6/6 green; fixed write_memory id=NULL bug
body.description:
Pre-Monday validation: verify the two semantic data services work. Librarian recall: seed a memory, call recall(topic='...'), verify it surfaces. Scraps embedding: call embed('test string'), verify result is a 1536-dim (or 384-dim hash fallback) vector with correct shape.

**Affected files:** tests/librarian/, tests/scraps/ (create if missing), devices/librarian/recall.py, devices/scraps/embedding_engine.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; real Postgres for Librarian; embedding test may use hash fallback if no OPENAI_API_KEY in .env
**Scope boundary:** IN — smoke test happy path for recall and embed(); OUT — full retrieval ranking, batch embedding performance
**Completion criteria:** pytest tests/librarian/ tests/scraps/ all green; embed() returns correct-dimension numpy array or list; recall() returns at least one result for a seeded query
